settings.hide_links_help: Prevent guests from following links in posts. Clicking a link shows a Login / Sign Up prompt instead.
settings.show_post_cta_label: Show Join CTA after a certain number of posts for guests
settings.show_post_cta_help: Display a Log In / Sign Up card between posts in a discussion, visible only to guests. Use the position setting to choose after which post it appears.
settings.position_help: Insert the CTA banner between this post number and the next one.

post_cta.text: Like what you see? Join the discussion!
